'''Builder shuttles''' were [[Transport/Legends|transports]] employed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

They were carried aboard ships such as [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]]. Builder shuttles would launch from orbiting [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] and drop off prefabricated buildings on [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] surfaces.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' {{1st}}
